title: Nigeria’s Real Estate Stakeholders Push for Reform, Collaboration Seen as Crucial at RESF 2025 - FinancialEDGE
description: Practitioners in Nigeria's real estate sector is crying out for urgent reform, according to stakeholders who converged on tueday at The Real Estate Stakeholders Forum (RESF) in Lagos, emphasized collaboration as a crucial step in tackling the country's pressing housing challenges and unlocking the sector's vast potential. The forum brought together over 1,000 industry leaders,
html: Practitioners in Nigeria’s real estate sector is crying out for urgent reform, according to stakeholders who converged on tueday at The Real Estate Stakeholders Forum (RESF) in Lagos, emphasized collaboration as a crucial step in tackling the country’s pressing housing challenges and unlocking the sector’s vast potential.
